body.title: Granny config: flip CC.0 to dispatch: bus once IDLE listener is live
body.result: config/granny.yaml CC.0 → dispatch: bus, mailbox: cc.0
body.intention: I intend that once the CC worker IDLE listener is running, CC dispatch uses the reliable two-phase bus handshake instead of a fire-and-forget tmux send-keys.
body.description:
With T-cc-worker-idle-listener shipped, the bus dispatch chain is complete end-to-end. This ticket flips config/granny.yaml CC.0 from dispatch: tmux_send_keys to dispatch: bus + mailbox: cc.0, enabling the full two-phase handshake: dispatch envelope → ack → prod-every-120s → started/timeout. The old tmux_send_keys path stays available in daemon.py as a named fallback but is no longer active for CC.0.

**Affected files:** config/granny.yaml
**Design rules:** none — config change only; no code changes
**Scope boundary:** Change CC.0's dispatch value and add mailbox field. DickSimnel.0 dispatch method is out of scope. No daemon.py code changes.
**Completion criteria:** After flip, Granny's log shows 'dispatched T-xxx → cc.0 via bus' (not 'send-keys → claude-main') for CC.0 tickets; imap.fetch_unseen('cc.0') shows a dispatch envelope; NO tmux send-keys call appears in Granny log for CC.0 dispatches. Test: run_once() with dispatch: bus config + FakeIMAP → verify envelope in cc.0, not a tmux subprocess call.
